mapper.select: SELECT claim_no FROM expense_claim WHERE claim_no LIKE CONCAT('RE', #{date}, '%') ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT ec.*, u.name as applicantName, d.dept_name as deptName FROM expense_claim ec LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON ec.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON ec.dept_id = d.id WHERE ec.status = 'pending' ORDER BY ec.submit_time ASC
